name: Agrícola Cerro Prieto
message: [AI generated] Agrícola Cerro Prieto is a Peruvian agricultural company, focused on the cultivation and exporting of a wide assortment of crops. Located in Chao, La Libertad, Peru, the enterprise is known for its cultivation of grapes, avocados, and asparagus among other products. Agrícola Cerro Prieto utilizes sophisticated irrigation systems and other technology to produce high-quality yields.
